message:
refactor(engine): reformat global coherence checker and add test enrichment

Apply rustfmt to the global coherence checker module, reformatting function
signatures, match arms, and struct literals to comply with the project's
line-width convention. Also reorder a use-statement import alphabetically
(derive_id moved to front).

Additionally adds enrichment tests covering:
- Composition graph adjacency edge cases
- Violation kind Display formatting verification
- CoherenceCheckInput validation boundaries
- Hash sensitivity of checker configuration

No logic changes to production code; formatting-only in impl blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
